dialogos.texto_en: Wow... What is this place...?
Fine dining like only the rich can afford.\nThey even have an indoor pool and a fitness center!
And the view from the lounge is also amazing!\nSo this is what a luxury resort hotel looks like!
I'm getting dizzy...\nAre we really staying here...?
Um, Futaro-kun?\nCan you calm down a bit?\nYou're attracting attention.
Well, it's true that it's\na bit more luxurious than usual.
A bit? This is just a bit?!
So the Nakano family is rich after all!
No, this time is thanks to Uesugi-san.
It seems like our dad splurged as a thank you\nfor completing your tutoring job.
I-is that so?
By the way,\nthere are other reasons why we chose this hotel!
This hotel has good access to tourist spots,\nso it's perfect as a base for traveling.
Also, the hotel provides various activity plans,\nwhich makes it easy for us to arrange our trip.
I-I see.
(Their way of using the hotel\n is different from my family...)
Sorry to keep you waiting.\nWe've finished checking-in.
And we got the room keys.
Thanks. This hotel has mostly twin rooms, right?
Yes. We booked four twin rooms.
Then, Futaro and I will share a room.
What?!
Um, I don't think that's a good idea, you know?\nEthically speaking!
I-indeed. It's as Yotsuba says.\nIt's inappropriate for minors of opposite genders\nto share a room, right?
Why not? It's okay. Futaro and I are dating.
N-no!\nI think it's better if we sleep in separate rooms.
Huh, why?\nOf all the people here, why are YOU trying to stop me Futaro?
Right now I'm responsible\nfor taking care of you guys on behalf of your dad.\nI prefer having a room of my own. I beg you.
(If I were caught in the same room as Nino...\n there'd be hell to pay!)
Okay, okay. Then let's assign the rooms\nin order from the top%p-2;――
Me and Nino, Miku and Yotsuba,\nItsuki and Raiha-chan.\nIs it okay if you're alone, Futaro-kun?
I think that's just fine!
Huh?\nGeez, you're so stubborn.\nThere's nothing I can do about it, then.
I don't think it's a matter of being STUBBORN...!
Itsuki, calm down. Now now.
*sigh*
Okay, let's get back on track.\nFor dinner tonight, I made a reservation\nfor Okinawan cuisine at the hotel restaurant.
This hotel's restaurant has a good reputation.\nThey cover many different cuisines\nand apparently their sweets are amazing.
Sounds good! I'm looking forward to it!
We have some time until dinner.\nIs it okay if we take some time for ourselves?
Okay, sure!
Well then, I'll be in my room%p-2;――
Hey, Futaro!\nI want to spend some time with you.
How about we all take a walk around the area together?\nIt's a tourist spot,\nso just walking around should be fun.
Guuuuys?\nI'd prefer to be alone with him.
Futaro-kun? I appreciate the sentiment,\nbut you have someone else\nyou need to be concerned about, right?
Ah...\nYeah, that's right...
I know! How about the lounge?
You two can just go there and enjoy the amazing view.
Alright, let's do that.
Okay, let's go!
Wait a minute.\nWe need to bring our luggage to our rooms first.
Okay, want to come to my room then?
Really?!
Well, I can't really offer you anything special.
It's okay if you're there, Futaro.
W-wait a minute. I already said\nthat it's inappropriate for minors of opposite genders to\nshare a room?
Even if Futaro says it's okay, it's not.
What have you guys been imagining?
W-well...
I said it without having any weird intentions...\nYour fantasy is running wild.
Still, it's not okay.\nFutaro's room is off-limits.
Right, what Miku said!\nAt least let's go to the lounge.
Well, that's not a bad idea.\nThe view seems nice there.
Hey, Futaro.\nHow about the two of us go to the lounge?
Sure, if you want to go, Nino I'll come along.\nLet's go.
Okay, let's go!
Wait a minute.\nWe need to bring our luggage to our rooms first.
Let's head for the lounge.\nThe view is nice there, right?
Just the two of us?
...Well, yeah. That's the plan.
I'm okay with that!\nI was curious about it too.
Our date in Okinawa starts at the lounge, huh?\nHehe, I'm excited.
Okay, let's go!
Wait a minute.\nWe need to bring our luggage to our rooms first.
We can just ask someone to do it for us.
Who should I ask...?
Excuse me.\nCan you please take this luggage to our room for us?
Right away.
(...Wow, they're used to asking for favors.)
What's wrong?\nLet's go, Futaro.
O-okay.
